oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Daily-drive v1.0.0 (session model) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.0.0 — the Workspace→Session model goes public (major bump): built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release live; Sparkle appcast signed + pushed (the v0.18.0 sign_update gotcha is resolved — the EdDSA key is now in the keychain and verified against SUPublicEDKey).

Workspace→Session hierarchy flatten merged (ADR 0004): removed Spaces/Sections/Tabs — a session = one never-split Claude pane + toggleable terminal panel; persistence v6→v7 migration; clean-break IPC/CLI v2 (session verbs, TIAN_SESSION_ID); sessions auto-name from the Claude pane title; Claude exit closes the session; terminal spawn + inspect panel follow Claude's EnterWorktree. Verified: 907 tianTests green, live v6→v7 + CLI smoke, 8-angle adversarial review with all confirmed findings fixed.

Released v0.18.0 (sidebar tab-name + per-tab branch rows): built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, GitHub Release live, Sparkle appcast signed + pushed. Gotcha: the Sparkle EdDSA private key is NOT in the local keychain, so publish.sh dies at sign_update — signed the DMG directly via `sign_update --ed-key-file` after verifying the key derives to the app's SUPublicEDKey (KDEXWrfR…).
